description_long: This pumping station features a robust, industrial design with two large, U-shaped pipes extending horizontally from a central rectangular housing. The pipes are metallic gray with yellow flanged ends, suggesting secure bolted connections for high-pressure fluid transfer. The central housing is boxy and reinforced, with a prominent vented grille on its front face, likely for cooling or airflow. Subtle green markings and bolts are visible at connection points, adding to the utilitarian appearance. The structure is constructed primarily from metal, with visible seams and joints indicating modular assembly. The overall form is compact yet sturdy, suitable for installation in urban utility zones or industrial environments.
description: A sturdy, industrial pumping station with two large U-shaped gray pipes and a central vented housing, accented by yellow flanges and green markings. The design is robust and modular, ideal for urban utility settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing both U-shaped pipes, the central vented grille, and all four yellow flanged pipe ends.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the pipes and the depth of the central housing, with two flanged ends visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back of the central housing and the circular ends of the pipes, with less detail on the vent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the pipe curvature and flanged ends from the other side.
attribute_ventilation_grilles: One rectangular vented grille on the front face of the central housing, approximately 0.3 meters wide.
